messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-495 — Make the topic recreation/restore repair path target a ticket's epic (or Backlog) topic instead of resurrecting a per-ticket topic
What it solves: REPAIR-PATH SLICE of the BL-491 epic. depends_on BL-493 (the recreation path must follow the new
fold model that BL-493 establishes).
First acceptance signal: Recreating an epic-bound ticket's topic targets its epic's topic
Approval context: Repair-path slice of the BL-491 epic. Contract: the topic recreation/restore path resolves a ticket's fold target (epic topic if epic-bound, else the Backlog topic) and reopens-or-recreates THAT, never a per-ticket topic; the old per-ticket recreation model is retired. FIRM: no per-ticket topic is …
BL-495 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-495" (or "reject BL-495 <reason>") to act.
